import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let v = match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    let v = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut sum = 0
  mut j = 0
  let total = list.len(nums)
  while j < total
    let x = match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    sum = sum + x
    if j == 0
      out = "#{sum}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sum}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
